contract.name: Open Box Route
contract.description: Moves the worker around an accessible side of a box to get behind it, opening a valid push route. Use it in Sokoban when a box is reachable but blocked from the needed pushing direction.

contract.name: Avoid Deadlock Pushes
contract.description: Before pushing a box, check that the destination won’t trap it against a wall or in a corner unless that square is a goal. Use this in midgame when repositioning near edges so you preserve future push

contract.name: Push Box Onto Target
contract.description: Push a box one square onto a target by moving the worker behind it and shoving it forward. Use this when a box is lined up with a target and the destination square is open, without trapping the box.

contract.name: Probe Corridor Access
contract.description: Moves the worker down narrow hallways and dead-end passages to check whether they connect to useful pushing positions or trap routes. Use it when the remaining box’s path is unclear and you need to re

contract.name: Reach Push Position
contract.description: Move the worker to the exact square beside a box needed for the next push, without moving any boxes yet. Use this in Sokoban when setting up a planned push path, especially early in the level.

contract.name: Detect Deadlock Early
contract.description: Detects deadlocks early by checking whether a pushed box is trapped against walls, in corners, or blocking narrow corridors without reaching a goal. Use it before every push, especially in endgames, t

contract.name: Get Behind Box
contract.description: Move the worker around to stand directly behind a box, on the side opposite the direction you want to push. Use this in Sokoban before any push, especially early on when setting up a box’s path.

contract.name: Reach Upper-Left Access
contract.description: Move the worker into the upper-left access route by navigating to the left side and then up around the box. Use this when you need top-left positioning to approach or push the box from below or the ri

contract.name: Hold Position Safely
contract.description: Keeps the worker on a safe floor tile without pushing the box into a wall or corner, preserving future moves. Use it in midgame when the path is tight and any push could trap the only box or block acc
